files.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0.2)
project(robot_manager_composition)

find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS roscpp std_srvs)

catkin_package()

include_directories(
  include
  ${catkin_INCLUDE_DIRS}
)

add_executable(system_information_test
  src/system_information_test_executable.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(system_information_test ${catkin_LIBRARIES})

expected_output.output:
Total CPU usage: 40.44%
Total memory usage: 76.36%

key_concepts_demonstrated: system resource reading via /proc/stat and sysinfo
